title: maireana marginata
intro: Maireana marginata, also known as the saltbush, is a shrub native to Western Australia, characterized by its small, green leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Maireana marginata include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Maireana marginata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
